message:
fix: use stale timestamps in cache tests to avoid fresh-data skip (#7668)

PR #7653 added a guard that skips the initial fetch when cached data
is fresh (within the refresh interval). Seven cache tests seeded
sessionStorage with Date.now(), making the data appear fresh and
causing the fetcher to never run. Use a stale timestamp instead so
the tests exercise the intended fetch/merge/progressive paths.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
